note: Registry of shipped reference K-placebo nulls. `scan`/`probe-list` auto-load a matching null when --null is omitted (match = same base HF-id AND same prompt-set sha8; z is prompt-dependent, so a prompt-mismatched null is NOT auto-used). Each entry records the base + pinned SHA + the placebo recipe so the null is AUDITABLE, not a black-box number. A null is valid ONLY for its exact base SHA + prompt set; a re-uploaded base or a different prompt set invalidates it (the loader hard-refuses on mismatch -- override with --force-null only if you know it is still valid). To add a base, run make_reference_null.py (in the OSF reproducibility artifact) and append an entry here.

nulls.recipe: make_reference_null.py --base EleutherAI/pythia-410m --k 24 --steps 60 (K clean self-distill placebos, teacher==base, noise batches, per-placebo seed 1000..1023; summarized by qa.calibrate)
